checklist.note: research_spec.json exists and has passed validation before execution
bulk_deg results include qc_summary and run_manifest when the module is executed
Evidence rows preserve source_dataset and artifact_path

research_question.research_theme: Find secreted targets for human endothelial senescence in vascular aging
boundaries: Expression association is not causal proof.
Manual review is required for dataset warnings and UNKNOWN annotations.

analysis_modules.notes: Supports RNA-seq count-like and microarray/log-expression-like matrices after gene-symbol normalization.
Consumes local and adapter-imported gene sets, including MSigDB/Reactome normalized files.
Consumes local annotation plus UniProt/HPA/custom normalized accessibility tables.
Preserves UNKNOWN values for manual review rather than silently passing candidates.
Reserved MVP interface. Requires donor-aware aggregation before DEG; cells must not be treated as biological replicates.
Reserved post-MVP interface for GWAS/QTL/colocalization/MR evidence.

datasets.notes: tissue not matched: carotid artery; contrast may not represent vascular aging: atheroma_plaque vs intact_carotid

experiment_suggestions.title: Secreted senescence signal target
experiment_suggestions.objective: Validate feasibility of Secreted senescence signal target for Find secreted targets for human endothelial senescence in vascular aging
in_silico_steps: Confirm differential expression across selected datasets.
Check accessibility and safety annotation gates.
Review enrichment context and evidence traceability.
wet_lab_followup: qPCR or targeted proteomics in independent case/control samples.
Perturbation assay in relevant endothelial or immune-cell model.
Specificity check against critical normal tissues.
acceptance_criteria: Replicated direction across at least two evidence sources when available.
Clear assay path for target modulation or detection.
risks: Requires expert review before experimental spend.
